headline: 《火遮眼》《痴迷》领跑今日娱乐热点
headlineEn: Fire in the Eyes and Obsession Lead Today's Entertainment Trends
summary: 今日无新片上映，但《火遮眼》《痴迷》等片持续霸榜，本周《福尔摩斯小姐3》《龙族》等备受期待。
summaryEn: No new releases today, but Fire in the Eyes and Obsession dominate; this week's highlights include Enola Holmes 3 and House of the Dragon.

industryHighlights.text: 本周新片《小黄人与大怪兽》引期待
industryHighlights.en: This week's new release Minions and the Big Monster draws anticipation

industryHighlights.text: 《蜘蛛侠：崭新之日》定档引粉丝狂欢
industryHighlights.en: Spider-Man: Brand New Day release date sparks fan frenzy
Toy Story 5 enters this week's trending list
